The [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub]] '''Boav Ion Drive''' was a commercially-available economy [[Ion engine/Legends|ion engine]]. With a cost of 10,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], and weighing only 10 metric tons, it was a simple engine solution. They were however difficult to install on non-SoroSuub [[Starship/Legends|ships]] since they were most compatible with other SoroSuub components.
